name: glean-plugins
description: Official Glean plugins for Claude Code - enterprise knowledge integration

plugins.name: glean-core
plugins.description: Core Glean MCP integration - shared skills, tool guidance, and configuration. Required foundation for all other Glean plugins.

plugins.name: glean-search
plugins.description: Enterprise search across documents, Slack, email, and other sources via Glean.

plugins.name: glean-people
plugins.description: Find experts, understand org structure, and identify stakeholders via Glean.

plugins.name: glean-meetings
plugins.description: Meeting intelligence - analyze transcripts, prepare for meetings, and catch up after time off.

plugins.name: glean-docs
plugins.description: Document intelligence - analyze docs, verify specs, and onboard to new areas.

plugins.name: glean-code
plugins.description: Cross-repository code exploration - search code across your org, find examples, and discover similar implementations.

plugins.name: glean-dev-docs
plugins.description: Access Glean's developer documentation - search API references, SDK guides, and integration tutorials.

plugins.name: glean-skills
plugins.description: Discover and create Claude Code skills from work patterns.

plugins.name: glean-productivity
plugins.description: Personal productivity - daily briefings, weekly summaries, and activity analysis via Glean.

plugins.name: glean-project
plugins.description: Project intelligence - generate comprehensive handoff documents when transitioning ownership.
